basis: Anchor 30 plan lists K'rrik as mono-black life-as-mana combo.
K'rrik rewards black pips, life gain, tutors and storm-like combo chains.
High-power/cEDH signals are bracket-aware and should not be forced into casual requests.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Fast combo/tutor density should be scaled by bracket.
Avoid off-color Phyrexian mana assumptions; identity remains mono-black.

themes.name: life_as_mana_combo
themes.notes: K'rrik converts black pips into explosive tempo with life as resource.

themes.name: mono_black_tutor_engine
themes.notes: Tutors and recursion assemble compact combo lines.

themes.name: lifegain_storm_safety
themes.notes: Life gain offsets commander payment and enables longer chains.

avoid_patterns.reason: K'rrik wants pip density and explosive life-payment lines.

examples: many pain effects without lifegain or wincon
avoid_patterns.reason: Life is a resource but still needs stabilization.

examples: non-black Phyrexian mana cards with colored identity
